message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl with PolicyDecision serde-matrix bead closure

Routine sync absorbing the close_reason update for bead
flywheel_connectors-qyq9l ("PolicyDecision serde tag matrix"), which
parallel agents flipped from in_progress → closed once
crates/fcp-core/tests/policy_decision_serde_tag_matrix.rs landed
upstream. Close-reason text records that 16/16 cases now pin
CheckOutcome (Allow/Deny/Skip, internally-tagged 'outcome'
snake_case) and audit::Decision (Allow/Deny, lowercase bare-string)
across JSON + CBOR, including the cross-shape distinctness assertion.

Single-line drift; pure metadata sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
